svg.title: Decision tree for the matching engine
svg.desc: Each partner row is tested against the internal stream. If the partner_txn_id matches an internal row, classify by amount agreement. If not, attempt composite fallback. If that fails, the row is missing-on-platform. Internal rows that nothing claimed are missing-at-partner. Matched rows are further checked for orphan churn and annotated with late-arrival.

g.text: After all partner rows are processed, unclaimed internal rows become missing_at_partner
1. exact match before fallback — high-confidence first, fewer false positives
2. fallback refuses ambiguity — 2+ candidates returns nothing, row becomes a break for human review
3. amount and orphan checks operate on matched set — they need both sides present
